title: Stele — shared memory for AI coding agents
excerpt: Shared memory for AI coding agents — Claude Code, Cursor, Codex. Decisions, tasks, and lessons in one shared record.
content_html:
Every agent, fluent in your project.

Stele gives the tools you already use a shared memory of your decisions, tasks, and lessons — one record every agent reads before it acts. Switch tools or sessions; the context stays.

Invite-only beta · we'll email you the moment a spot opens — no spam.

Already invited? Install the CLI

$curl -fsSL https://app.stele-ai.dev/install.sh | bash

Plugs intoClaude CodeCursorCodexAntigravityCopilotOpenCodeGrok BuildKimi Code CLI

What Stele is

A project memory every agent reads — and writes.

Stele is a shared ledger: a live record of what your agents know, what they've decided, and what they're working on. Every agent reads it before it answers. Everything useful it learns, it writes back.

One living memory.

Decisions, lessons, and risks in a shared record every agent reads before it acts — and writes back as it learns. Not a passive log: it surfaces the right context at the moment a change would repeat a past mistake.

Work the whole team can see.

Tasks belong to the project, not a person. Agents claim them atomically, so two sessions never start the same work — and an operator can pick up the open queue and run it end to end.

Continuity across every tool.

Plan with one agent, build with another, switch when a quota fills. Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and more read the same graph — so your project's memory belongs to your team, not to any one tool.

How it works · about a minute

Three commands, then it's automatic.

No dashboard to configure and no workflow to learn. You set it up once, then keep prompting your agent exactly the way you do today.

01

Get your invite & sign in

One line installs the stele CLI. Sign in with the email your invite was sent to — no separate account to create.

02

Run /stele:start

Inside your agent, run it once. Stele wires into your project and builds the first record.

Keep working

That's it. Your agent now reads the record before it answers and writes back what it learns.

Copy & run — that's step one

terminal

# installs the stele CLI & signs you in

$curl -fsSL https://app.stele-ai.dev/install.sh | bash

$stele account login

→ signed in ✓

macOS, Linux & Windows · one binary. Sign-in works once you're invited.

In practice

The record catches what a fresh agent can't.

A small moment that happens in any project with more than one contributor — human or agent. Here's how it goes when the reasoning lives in the record instead of someone's memory.

Catch a returning bug

A harmless-looking change reintroduces a problem you already paid for.

The linked risk surfaces while the work is happening — not after it ships. The agent pauses and asks instead of guessing.

See more examples in the docs

your agentstele · on

You

"This lock looks unnecessary — I'm removing it."

Stele

That lock came from TASK-91 during the auth rework. Removing it reintroduces ⚠ KNOW-118, a race condition that reached production once. Want me to keep the guard and simplify around it instead?

Works with your agents

Bring the agents you already use.

Stele plugs into the coding agents you work in today — and any MCP-compatible client through the hosted server. Plan with one, build with another, switch when a quota fills; they all read and write the same project graph.

Claude CodeCursorCodexAntigravityCopilotOpenCodeGrok BuildKimi Code CLIany MCP client

More than memory

Everything orbits the record.

The memory is the center; these are the tools you act on it with — each one sharper because it shares the same graph.

Kept honest

A graph that maintains itself

Stale entries are flagged, resolved risks retire, duplicates surface, and reversed decisions stop being served as truth — and your agents re-verify facts against the live code, so the record stays trustworthy instead of rotting as it grows.

Provenance

Trace why anything exists

Walk from a decision back to the task, the document, the risk, and the person who made the call. Your agents act on the reasons behind the work, not just the instruction in front of them.

Coordination

Tasks the team claims

Project-level tasks, claimed atomically so no two agents do the same work twice — and an operator that reads the open queue, runs it, and writes a handoff for the next session.

Assistant

Ask your project anything

A built-in assistant answers from your live graph — project status, history, where to start — with the full context already loaded.

Your data

Yours, and only yours

Hosted, so there's nothing to run — and your data stays private per project, never sold or used to train models without your say-so. Export all of it, or delete it, yourself — anytime.

Onboarding

Starts from your code

Point Stele at an existing repo and it maps the codebase and the docs it finds to seed the record — so a new contributor, human or agent, is productive from day one.

Questions

Straight answers.

The things people actually ask before they try Stele.

What is Stele?

Stele is shared memory for AI coding agents — one record of your project's decisions, tasks, and lessons that every agent reads before it acts and writes back to as it works. Switch tools or start a new session, and the context stays.

Which AI agents and tools does it work with?

Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Antigravity, Copilot, OpenCode, Grok Build, and Kimi Code CLI — plus any MCP-compatible client and the stele CLI. Plan with one agent, build with another; they all read and write the same project record.

How do I get access? Is it invite-only?

Yes — Stele is invite-only while we open up gradually. Join the waitlist at stele-ai.dev and we'll email you the moment a spot opens — no code-hunting required.

Can't I already do this with Notion, Obsidian, or a file in my repo?

A file has no opinion about what's still true. You reverse a decision, but the old one is still sitting there — and weeks later an agent reads it, believes it, and rebuilds the thing you tore out. Nothing flagged it, because a file can't tell when it has gone wrong. Stele can. A reversed decision is retired: still visible, still explaining itself, but no longer served as truth — and whatever replaced it comes back alongside, carrying the reason for the change. Resolved risks retire themselves, and facts that have drifted get flagged for review. The difference isn't where your notes live. It's whether anything is keeping them true. Full walkthrough at stele-ai.dev/docs/conflicting-facts.

Can I use Stele away from my machine?

Yes — Stele is hosted, so you reach your project from any device without opening the repo. Create tasks, jot ideas, and get detailed answers with no source code or computer in front of you. Non-coding agents like ChatGPT connect over MCP and get the same context your coding agent has, down to the task in progress.

Why pay when free, open-source graph and RAG tools exist?

Those give you a store or a retrieval library — you still have to wire and operate the whole loop yourself: read context before every prompt, write it back mid-task, claim tasks, keep it from rotting, and make it work across every agent. Stele is that loop, already built, hosted, and shared across your tools and teammates. If the open tools already fit your needs, they're the right choice — and an open, SQLite-backed version of Stele is planned for self-hosting. The managed version is for when you want the cross-agent record that just works everywhere.

Is my code and data private?

Yes. Your data is private per project, never sold or used to train models without your say-so, and your source code stays on your machine. Export or delete everything yourself, anytime.

Do I have to run any infrastructure?

No — Stele is hosted, so there's nothing to run. Install the CLI, sign in, and point it at a project; a new contributor, human or agent, is productive from day one.

stele · a record that endures

Give your project a memory in three commands.

The decisions, the tasks, and the lessons behind your code — in one record your future self and every agent you work with can read.

Invite-only during beta · already invited? Sign in with that email

blocks.html_en: Stale entries are flagged, resolved risks retire, duplicates surface, and reversed decisions stop being served as truth — and your agents re-verify facts against the live code, so the record stays trustworthy instead of rotting as it grows.

sentences.en: Stale entries are flagged, resolved risks retire, duplicates surface, and reversed decisions stop being served as truth — and your agents re-verify facts against the live code, so the record stays trustworthy instead of rotting as it grows.
sentences.zh: 陈旧的条目会被标记，已解决的风险会消失，重复的内容会出现，而相反的决定将不再被视为事实——并且您的代理会根据实时代码重新验证事实，因此记录保持可信，而不是随着记录的增长而腐烂。

sentences.en: Provenance
sentences.zh: 出处

sentences.en: Trace why anything exists
sentences.zh: 追踪任何事物存在的原因

blocks.html_en: Walk from a decision back to the task, the document, the risk, and the person who made the call. Your agents act on the reasons behind the work, not just the instruction in front of them.

sentences.en: Walk from a decision back to the task, the document, the risk, and the person who made the call.
sentences.zh: 从决策回到任务、文档、风险和打电话的人。

sentences.en: Your agents act on the reasons behind the work, not just the instruction in front of them.
sentences.zh: 您的代理根据工作背后的原因行事，而不仅仅是他们面前的指示。

sentences.en: Coordination
sentences.zh: 协调

sentences.en: Tasks the team claims
sentences.zh: 团队声称的任务

blocks.html_en: Project-level tasks, claimed atomically so no two agents do the same work twice — and an operator that reads the open queue, runs it, and writes a handoff for the next session.

sentences.en: Project-level tasks, claimed atomically so no two agents do the same work twice — and an operator that reads the open queue, runs it, and writes a handoff for the next session.
sentences.zh: 项目级任务，以原子方式声明，因此没有两个代理会重复执行相同的工作 - 以及一个操作员读取打开队列，运行它，并为下一个会话写入切换。

sentences.en: Assistant
sentences.zh: 助手

sentences.en: Ask your project anything
sentences.zh: 向您的项目询问任何问题

blocks.html_en: A built-in assistant answers from your live graph — project status, history, where to start — with the full context already loaded.

sentences.en: A built-in assistant answers from your live graph — project status, history, where to start — with the full context already loaded.
sentences.zh: 内置助手会从您的实时图表中给出答案 - 项目状态、历史记录、从哪里开始 - 并已加载完整的上下文。

sentences.en: Your data
sentences.zh: 您的数据

sentences.en: Yours, and only yours
sentences.zh: 你的，也只属于你的

blocks.html_en: Hosted, so there's nothing to run — and your data stays private per project, never sold or used to train models without your say-so. Export all of it, or delete it, yourself — anytime.

sentences.en: Hosted, so there's nothing to run — and your data stays private per project, never sold or used to train models without your say-so.
sentences.zh: 托管，因此无需运行任何内容 - 并且您的数据在每个项目中都是私有的，未经您同意，绝不会出售或用于训练模型。

sentences.en: Export all of it, or delete it, yourself — anytime.
sentences.zh: 随时导出或删除所有内容。

sentences.en: Onboarding
sentences.zh: 入职

sentences.en: Starts from your code
sentences.zh: 从你的代码开始

blocks.html_en: Point Stele at an existing repo and it maps the codebase and the docs it finds to seed the record — so a new contributor, human or agent, is productive from day one.

sentences.en: Point Stele at an existing repo and it maps the codebase and the docs it finds to seed the record — so a new contributor, human or agent, is productive from day one.
sentences.zh: 将 Stele 指向现有的存储库，它会映射代码库和它找到的文档来播种记录 - 因此新的贡献者（人类或代理）从第一天起就富有成效。

sentences.en: Questions
sentences.zh: 问题

sentences.en: Straight answers.
sentences.zh: 直接回答。

blocks.html_en: The things people actually ask before they try Stele.

sentences.en: The things people actually ask before they try Stele.
sentences.zh: 人们在尝试 Stele 之前实际上会问的问题。

blocks.html_en: Stele is shared memory for AI coding agents — one record of your project's decisions, tasks, and lessons that every agent reads before it acts and writes back to as it works. Switch tools or start a new session, and the context stays.

sentences.en: Stele is shared memory for AI coding agents — one record of your project's decisions, tasks, and lessons that every agent reads before it acts and writes back to as it works.
sentences.zh: Stele 是 AI 编码代理的共享内存，是项目决策、任务和课程的记录，每个代理在执行操作之前都会读取并在工作时写回。

sentences.en: Switch tools or start a new session, and the context stays.
sentences.zh: 切换工具或开始新会话，上下文仍会保留。

blocks.html_en: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Antigravity, Copilot, OpenCode, Grok Build, and Kimi Code CLI — plus any MCP-compatible client and the stele CLI. Plan with one agent, build with another; they all read and write the same project record.

sentences.en: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Antigravity, Copilot, OpenCode, Grok Build, and Kimi Code CLI — plus any MCP-compatible client and the stele CLI.
sentences.zh: Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、Antigravity、Copilot、OpenCode、Grok Build 和 Kimi Code CLI — 以及任何 MCP 兼容客户端和 stele CLI。

sentences.en: Plan with one agent, build with another; they all read and write the same project record.
sentences.zh: 与一位代理一起规划，与另一位代理一起构建；他们都读取和写入相同的项目记录。

blocks.html_en: Yes — Stele is invite-only while we open up gradually. Join the waitlist at stele-ai.dev and we'll email you the moment a spot opens — no code-hunting required.

sentences.en: Yes — Stele is invite-only while we open up gradually.
sentences.zh: 是的 - 当我们逐渐开放时，Stele 仅限受邀者参加。

sentences.en: Join the waitlist at stele-ai.dev and we'll email you the moment a spot opens — no code-hunting required.
sentences.zh: 加入 stele-ai.dev 的候补名单，我们会在名额空缺时向您发送电子邮件 - 无需寻找代码。

blocks.html_en: A file has no opinion about what's still true. You reverse a decision, but the old one is still sitting there — and weeks later an agent reads it, believes it, and rebuilds the thing you tore out. Nothing flagged it, because a file can't tell when it has gone wrong. Stele can. A reversed decision is retired: still visible, still explaining itself, but no longer served as truth — and whatever replaced it comes back alongside, carrying the reason for the change. Resolved risks retire themselves, and facts that have drifted get flagged for review. The difference isn't where your notes live. It's whether anything is keeping them true. Full walkthrough at stele-ai.dev/docs/conflicting-facts.

sentences.en: A file has no opinion about what's still true.
sentences.zh: 文件对于什么仍然是真实的没有任何意见。

sentences.en: You reverse a decision, but the old one is still sitting there — and weeks later an agent reads it, believes it, and rebuilds the thing you tore out.
sentences.zh: 你推翻了一个决定，但旧的决定仍然放在那里——几周后，一名特工读到了它，相信了它，并重建了你撕掉的东西。

sentences.en: Nothing flagged it, because a file can't tell when it has gone wrong.
sentences.zh: 没有任何东西标记它，因为文件无法判断它何时出错。

sentences.en: Stele can.
sentences.zh: 明星可以。

sentences.en: A reversed decision is retired: still visible, still explaining itself, but no longer served as truth — and whatever replaced it comes back alongside, carrying the reason for the change.
sentences.zh: 一个相反的决定已经退休：仍然可见，仍然可以解释自己，但不再是真理——无论取代它的是什么，它都会回来，带着改变的原因。

sentences.en: Resolved risks retire themselves, and facts that have drifted get flagged for review.
sentences.zh: 已解决的风险会自行消失，而已经发生变化的事实会被标记为需要审查。

sentences.en: The difference isn't where your notes live.
sentences.zh: 区别不在于你的笔记所在的位置。

sentences.en: It's whether anything is keeping them true.
sentences.zh: 关键在于是否有什么东西能让它们保持真实。

sentences.en: Full walkthrough at stele-ai.dev/docs/conflicting-facts.
sentences.zh: 完整演练位于 stele-ai.dev/docs/conflicting-facts。

blocks.html_en: Yes — Stele is hosted, so you reach your project from any device without opening the repo. Create tasks, jot ideas, and get detailed answers with no source code or computer in front of you. Non-coding agents like ChatGPT connect over MCP and get the same context your coding agent has, down to the task in progress.

sentences.en: Yes — Stele is hosted, so you reach your project from any device without opening the repo.
sentences.zh: 是的 - Stele 是托管的，因此您可以从任何设备访问您的项目，而无需打开存储库。

sentences.en: Create tasks, jot ideas, and get detailed answers with no source code or computer in front of you.
sentences.zh: 创建任务、记下想法并获得详细的答案，而无需源代码或计算机在您面前。

sentences.en: Non-coding agents like ChatGPT connect over MCP and get the same context your coding agent has, down to the task in progress.
sentences.zh: ChatGPT 等非编码代理通过 MCP 连接，并获得与编码代理相同的上下文，直至正在进行的任务。

blocks.html_en: Those give you a store or a retrieval library — you still have to wire and operate the whole loop yourself: read context before every prompt, write it back mid-task, claim tasks, keep it from rotting, and make it work across every agent. Stele is that loop, already built, hosted, and shared across your tools and teammates. If the open tools already fit your needs, they're the right choice — and an open, SQLite-backed version of Stele is planned for self-hosting. The managed version is for when you want the cross-agent record that just works everywhere.

sentences.en: Those give you a store or a retrieval library — you still have to wire and operate the whole loop yourself: read context before every prompt, write it back mid-task, claim tasks, keep it from rotting, and make it work across every agent.
sentences.zh: 这些为您提供了一个存储或检索库 - 您仍然需要自己连接和操作整个循环：在每个提示之前读取上下文，在任务中将其写回，声明任务，防止其腐烂，并使其在每个代理中工作。

sentences.en: Stele is that loop, already built, hosted, and shared across your tools and teammates.
sentences.zh: Stele 就是那个循环，已经在您的工具和团队成员之间构建、托管和共享。

sentences.en: If the open tools already fit your needs, they're the right choice — and an open, SQLite-backed version of Stele is planned for self-hosting.
sentences.zh: 如果开放工具已经满足您的需求，那么它们就是正确的选择 - 并且计划推出一个开放的、SQLite 支持的 Stele 版本用于自托管。

sentences.en: The managed version is for when you want the cross-agent record that just works everywhere.
sentences.zh: 托管版本适用于您希望跨代理记录在任何地方都有效的情况。

blocks.html_en: Yes. Your data is private per project, never sold or used to train models without your say-so, and your source code stays on your machine. Export or delete everything yourself, anytime.

sentences.en: Yes.
sentences.zh: 是的。

sentences.en: Your data is private per project, never sold or used to train models without your say-so, and your source code stays on your machine.
sentences.zh: 您的数据对于每个项目都是私有的，未经您同意，绝不会出售或用于训练模型，并且您的源代码保留在您的计算机上。

sentences.en: Export or delete everything yourself, anytime.
sentences.zh: 随时自行导出或删除所有内容。

blocks.html_en: No — Stele is hosted, so there's nothing to run. Install the CLI, sign in, and point it at a project; a new contributor, human or agent, is productive from day one.

sentences.en: No — Stele is hosted, so there's nothing to run.
sentences.zh: 否 — Stele 是托管的，因此无需运行任何内容。

sentences.en: Install the CLI, sign in, and point it at a project; a new contributor, human or agent, is productive from day one.
sentences.zh: 安装 CLI、登录并将其指向项目；新的贡献者，无论是人类还是代理，从第一天起就富有成效。

sentences.en: stele · a record that endures
sentences.zh: 石碑·永恒的记录

blocks.html_en: Give your project a memory in three commands.

sentences.en: Give your project a memory in three commands.
sentences.zh: 通过三个命令为您的项目提供记忆。

blocks.html_en: The decisions, the tasks, and the lessons behind your code — in one record your future self and every agent you work with can read.

sentences.en: The decisions, the tasks, and the lessons behind your code — in one record your future self and every agent you work with can read.
sentences.zh: 代码背后的决策、任务和经验教训 — 在一份记录中记录了未来的自己，并且与您一起工作的每个代理都可以阅读。

blocks.html_en: Invite-only during beta · already invited? Sign in with that email

sentences.en: Invite-only during beta · already invited?
sentences.zh: 测试期间仅限受邀者 · 已受邀？

sentences.en: Sign in with that email
sentences.zh: 使用该电子邮件登录

content_html_zh:
每个代理都熟悉您的项目。

Stele 为您已经使用的工具提供了有关您的决策、任务和课程的共享记忆——每个代理在采取行动之前都会读取一份记录。 切换工具或会话；上下文保持不变。

仅限受邀者参加测试版 · 我们会在名额开放后立即向您发送电子邮件 — 绝无垃圾邮件。

已经邀请了？ 安装命令行界面

$curl -fsSL https://app.stele-ai.dev/install.sh |巴什

插入Claude CodeCursorCodexAntigravityCopilotOpenCodeGrok BuildKimi Code CLI

碑是什么

每个代理都会读取和写入的项目内存。

Stele 是一个共享账本：实时记录您的代理所知道的内容、他们的决定以及他们正在做的事情。 每个代理在回答之前都会阅读它。 它学到的一切有用的东西，都会写回来。

一份鲜活的记忆。

每个代理在采取行动之前都会读取共享记录中的决策、经验教训和风险，并在学习时写回。 不是被动的日志：它在更改会重复过去的错误时显示正确的上下文。

整个团队都可以看到的工作。

任务属于项目，而不属于个人。 代理以原子方式声明它们，因此两个会话永远不会开始相同的工作 - 并且操作员可以拾取打开的队列并端到端地运行它。

每个工具的连续性。

与一名代理一起规划，与另一名代理一起构建，在配额满时切换。 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex 等读取相同的图表 - 因此您的项目内存属于您的团队，而不是任何一种工具。

工作原理·大约一分钟

三个命令，然后就自动了。

无需配置仪表板，也无需学习工作流程。 您设置一次，然后按照您今天的方式继续提示您的代理。

01

获取您的邀请并登录

一行安装 stele CLI。 使用您发送邀请的电子邮件登录 - 无需创建单独的帐户。

02

运行 /stele:start

在您的代理内部，运行一次。 Stele 连接到您的项目并构建第一个记录。

继续工作

就是这样。 现在，您的代理会在应答之前读取记录并写回所学到的内容。

复制并运行——这是第一步

终端

# 安装 stele CLI 并让您登录

$curl -fsSL https://app.stele-ai.dev/install.sh |巴什

$stele 帐户登录

→ 已登录 ✓

macOS、Linux 和 Windows · 一个二进制文件。 收到邀请后即可登录。

在实践中

记录捕捉到了新特工无法捕捉到的东西。

在任何有多个贡献者（人类或代理）的项目中都会发生的一个小时刻。 当推理存在于记录而不是某人的记忆中时，情况是这样的。

捕获返回的错误

看似无害的更改会重新引入您已经付出代价的问题。

相关风险在工作进行时就会显现出来，而不是在交付之后。 特工停下来询问，而不是猜测。

See more examples in the docs

您的代理电话 · 上

You

“这把锁看起来没有必要——我要把它拆掉。”

Stele

该锁来自 TASK-91 在身份验证返工期间。 删除它会重新引入 ⚠ KNOW-118，这是一种曾经达到生产状态的竞争条件。 希望我保持警惕并围绕它进行简化吗？

与您的代理商合作

带上您已经使用的代理。

Stele 可通过托管服务器插入您当前使用的编码代理以及任何与 MCP 兼容的客户端。 与一个计划，与另一个构建，配额满时切换；他们都读写相同的项目图。

Claude CodeCursorCodexAntigravityCopilotOpenCodeGrok BuildKimi Code CLIany MCP 客户端

不仅仅是记忆

一切都围绕记录运行。

记忆是中心；这些是你用来操作的工具——每一个都更清晰，因为它共享相同的图表。

保持诚实

能够自我维护的图表

陈旧的条目会被标记，已解决的风险会消失，重复的内容会出现，而相反的决定将不再被视为事实——并且您的代理会根据实时代码重新验证事实，因此记录保持可信，而不是随着记录的增长而腐烂。

出处

追踪任何事物存在的原因

从决策回到任务、文档、风险和打电话的人。 您的代理根据工作背后的原因行事，而不仅仅是他们面前的指示。

协调

团队声称的任务

项目级任务，以原子方式声明，因此没有两个代理会重复执行相同的工作 - 以及一个操作员读取打开队列，运行它，并为下一个会话写入切换。

助手

向您的项目询问任何问题

内置助手会从您的实时图表中给出答案 - 项目状态、历史记录、从哪里开始 - 并已加载完整的上下文。

您的数据

你的，也只属于你的

托管，因此无需运行任何内容 - 并且您的数据在每个项目中都是私有的，未经您同意，绝不会出售或用于训练模型。 随时导出或删除所有内容。

入职

从你的代码开始

将 Stele 指向现有的存储库，它会映射代码库和它找到的文档来播种记录 - 因此新的贡献者（人类或代理）从第一天起就富有成效。

问题

直接回答。

人们在尝试 Stele 之前实际上会问的问题。

What is Stele?

Stele 是 AI 编码代理的共享内存，是项目决策、任务和课程的记录，每个代理在执行操作之前都会读取并在工作时写回。 切换工具或开始新会话，上下文仍会保留。

Which AI agents and tools does it work with?

Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、Antigravity、Copilot、OpenCode、Grok Build 和 Kimi Code CLI — 以及任何 MCP 兼容客户端和 stele CLI。 与一位代理一起规划，与另一位代理一起构建；他们都读取和写入相同的项目记录。

How do I get access? Is it invite-only?

是的 - 当我们逐渐开放时，Stele 仅限受邀者参加。 加入 stele-ai.dev 的候补名单，我们会在名额空缺时向您发送电子邮件 - 无需寻找代码。

Can't I already do this with Notion, Obsidian, or a file in my repo?

文件对于什么仍然是真实的没有任何意见。 你推翻了一个决定，但旧的决定仍然放在那里——几周后，一名特工读到了它，相信了它，并重建了你撕掉的东西。 没有任何东西标记它，因为文件无法判断它何时出错。 明星可以。 一个相反的决定已经退休：仍然可见，仍然可以解释自己，但不再是真理——无论取代它的是什么，它都会回来，带着改变的原因。 已解决的风险会自行消失，而已经发生变化的事实会被标记为需要审查。 区别不在于你的笔记所在的位置。 关键在于是否有什么东西能让它们保持真实。 完整演练位于 stele-ai.dev/docs/conflicting-facts。

Can I use Stele away from my machine?

是的 - Stele 是托管的，因此您可以从任何设备访问您的项目，而无需打开存储库。 创建任务、记下想法并获得详细的答案，而无需源代码或计算机在您面前。 ChatGPT 等非编码代理通过 MCP 连接，并获得与编码代理相同的上下文，直至正在进行的任务。

Why pay when free, open-source graph and RAG tools exist?

这些为您提供了一个存储或检索库 - 您仍然需要自己连接和操作整个循环：在每个提示之前读取上下文，在任务中将其写回，声明任务，防止其腐烂，并使其在每个代理中工作。 Stele 就是那个循环，已经在您的工具和团队成员之间构建、托管和共享。 如果开放工具已经满足您的需求，那么它们就是正确的选择 - 并且计划推出一个开放的、SQLite 支持的 Stele 版本用于自托管。 托管版本适用于您希望跨代理记录在任何地方都有效的情况。

Is my code and data private?

是的。 您的数据对于每个项目都是私有的，未经您同意，绝不会出售或用于训练模型，并且您的源代码保留在您的计算机上。 随时自行导出或删除所有内容。

Do I have to run any infrastructure?

否 — Stele 是托管的，因此无需运行任何内容。 安装 CLI、登录并将其指向项目；新的贡献者，无论是人类还是代理，从第一天起就富有成效。

石碑·永恒的记录

通过三个命令为您的项目提供记忆。
